# Workspace Instructions for GitHub Copilot

This repository is a personal portfolio/profile repository containing a single `README.md` file. There is no application source code, build pipeline, or test suite in this workspace.

## What this workspace is about

- A personal profile repository for Mayank Yadav.
- The main content is in `README.md`.
- The repo currently does not contain code, configuration, or deployment files.

## Use these instructions when

- editing or improving `README.md`
- suggesting better wording, structure, or formatting for a personal portfolio
- recommending GitHub profile README best practices
- proposing tech stack descriptions or learning goals based on the existing content

## Do not do

- assume there is a web app, server, or build system in this repository
- suggest edits for files or folders that do not exist in the workspace
- invent CI/CD pipelines, package manager commands, or runtime environments unless the user asks for a new project scaffold

## Helpful guidance

- Focus on improving the personal profile story, resume-style sections, and visual formatting.
- Keep recommendations aligned with a static GitHub profile README.
- If asked to add code, clarify what language/framework the user wants and whether they want a new project added to this repository.

## Example prompts

- "Improve the introduction and About Me section in `README.md`."
- "Suggest a cleaner layout for this portfolio README."
- "Help me rewrite the Tech Stack section to be more concise and professional."
- "What are the best next steps for this repository if I want to turn it into a web portfolio site?"
